allow: Bash(python -c "import ast,io; [print\(f, 'parsed OK,', sum\(isinstance\(n,ast.FunctionDef\) and ast.get_docstring\(n\) is not None for n in ast.walk\(ast.parse\(open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\)\)\), 'of', sum\(isinstance\(n,ast.FunctionDef\) for n in ast.walk\(ast.parse\(open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\)\)\), 'functions have docstrings'\) for f in ['app.py','graphrag_policy_bot.py']]")
